# Oliver Cassels

> Senior executive and board search adviser, exclusively focused on the global food and agribusiness sector.

Oliver Cassels (known as Olly) is a specialist executive search practitioner based in Wiltshire, UK. He advises boards and leadership teams on senior executive and non-executive director appointments across the food and agribusiness value chain.

## What he does

Oliver runs retained executive search mandates at C-suite, VP and board level. His sector coverage spans the full food and agricultural value chain: farm inputs, primary production, agri-technology, food manufacturing, food ingredients, foodservice, and food and agricultural investment.

He works with a small number of clients at any one time, and handles every search personally from initial brief through to appointment.

He is currently an Associate Managing Director at Kincannon & Reed, a leading global executive search firm specialising in food and agribusiness, through which client mandates are managed.

## Background

- Associate Managing Director, Kincannon & Reed Global Executive Search (2023 to present)
- Talent Partner, Taptap Send (venture-backed fintech, 2021 to 2022)
- Senior Marketing and Business Development Manager, Origin Digital (agricultural software, 2020 to 2021)
- Account Manager and Product Manager, Map of Agriculture (agri data platform, 2017 to 2020)
- Business Development Manager, H2O Venture Partners, Kigali, Rwanda (agricultural ventures in East Africa, 2015 to 2016)
- New Entrepreneurs Foundation (2013 to 2014)

## Education

- MSc Agricultural Economics, University of Reading
- MA Political Science and Geography, Trinity College Dublin
- Certificate in Sustainable Food Production and Processing, University of Cambridge (2025)

## Who he works with

- Private equity-backed food and agribusiness businesses
- Family-owned agribusinesses undergoing leadership transition
- Venture-backed agri-technology companies
- Listed food and agricultural businesses
- Agricultural investment funds
- Food ingredients and supply chain businesses

## Location

Wiltshire, United Kingdom. Works globally.

## Contact

Website: https://olivercassels.com
